summary: Theme park / live entertainment app with shows listing, audition forms (Usher, Haunted House Supervisor), and new shows being added: Waterworks Stunt Show (2027), Dog Show (2029), and Halfway to Horror Nights (annual May event).
architectural_notes: App includes a shows listing page where new shows (Waterworks, Dog Show, Halfway to Horror Nights) are added
App includes audition forms for Usher and Haunted House Supervisor roles
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dramatic action scene of jet skis racing on water with massive fire explosions, water spray, and intense stunt fighting silhouettes on the water — vivid oranges, reds, and neon reflections on dark water (waterworks-stunt-show-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
- Atmospheric horror story illustration with dramatic fog, spotlights illuminating an array of terrifying masks mounted on a dark wall, blood-red and deep shadow tones evoking mystery and dread (halfway-to-horror-nights-banner.dim_1200x500.png)

existing_features.title: Add a 'Waterworks Stunt Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Waterworks Stunt Show', a description highlighting jet skis, fire, blood-pumping action, and choreographed stunt fighting combat, a 'Coming 2027' year tag, and mark it as a non-haunt-season show.

Add a 'Dog Show' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Dog Show', a fun family-friendly description emphasizing interactive entertainment for the whole family, performing dogs, and a meet & greet / petting experience after the show, and a 'Coming 2029' year tag.

Add a 'Halfway to Horror Nights' entry to the shows content array in frontend/src/content/shows.ts with name 'Halfway to Horror Nights', a description dedicated to the Horror Nights origin story — covering how the event came about, a showcase of masks used throughout the event's history, and its annual May timing.

Register the AI-generated jet ski banner image for Waterworks Stunt Show and the AI-generated atmospheric story banner image for Halfway to Horror Nights in frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts, mapping each show name to its corresponding asset path under frontend/public/assets/generated/.

Update frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSection.tsx to display the AI-generated banner images for Waterworks Stunt Show and Halfway to Horror Nights on their respective show cards, using the generatedImages map. Dog Show card should render without a custom generated image (use a placeholder or omit the image gracefully if no image is mapped).

new_feature_requests.summary: Add Waterworks Stunt Show page with AI-generated jet ski banner image, stunt fighting/fire/action description, Coming 2027 tag
Add Dog Show page with family-friendly interactive description, meet & greet with dogs, Coming 2029 tag
Add Halfway to Horror Nights page with AI-generated atmospheric banner image, Horror Nights origin story and masks showcase, annual May event
